title: ferray-stats: where_ always copies and flattens — should use nonzero for index arrays
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

NumPy's np.where(condition) is equivalent to np.nonzero(condition) — returns indices. np.where(condition, x, y) is the ternary selection. ferray-stats has where_ as a function in searching.rs. Check that: (1) the 1-arg form matches nonzero behavior, (2) the 3-arg form with x,y supports broadcasting. NumPy's 3-arg where is one of its most-used functions for conditional array logic.
